title: GoDaddy (GDDY) to Grow Portfolio Offerings Via Dan.com Buyout
text: GoDaddy (GDDY) inks a deal to take over Dan.com to provide advanced domain services to customers.

title: 4 Internet Delivery Stocks to Focus On in a Flourishing Industry
text: The Zacks Internet - Delivery Services industry players like GoDaddy (GDDY), MakeMyTrip (MMYT), QuinStreet (QNST) and Asure Software (ASUR) are poised to benefit from the reopening of economies, and surging smartphone and Internet penetration in the emerging markets.
